bird.name: 黑头鹀
bird.summary: 黑头鹀（学名：Emberiza melanocephala）为鵐科鹀属的鸟类。它在東南歐至伊朗繁殖，並在冬季主要遷徙到印度，有些個體會進一步遷徙到東南亞。像同科的其他鳥類一樣，它們生活在開闊的草原棲地，成群飛翔，尋找穀物和種子。成年的雄鳥特徵明顯，具有黃色的腹部、栗色的背部和黑…

relations.subject: 黑头鹀
relations.evidence: Like others in its family, it is found in open grassland habitats where they fly in flocks in search of grains and seed
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: 黑头鹀
relations.evidence: In winter they move to Asia and large flocks are found in agricultural fields and grasslands
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: 黑头鹀
relations.evidence: thumb|Eggs - MHNT The black-headed bunting is found in flocks as it forages on grasslands for seeds
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。
